D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

DXT / BC1 — 4×4 Block Texture Compression

Each 4×4 block stored as 2 endpoint colours (RGB565) + 16 two-bit indices into a 4-colour palette interpolated between them; 4:1 ratio, fixed-rate, GPU-native

DXT1 (now BC1) was the original 1999 S3 Texture Compression. Critical for real-time rendering because GPU samplers decode on-the-fly. The downside: blocky artifacts on smooth gradients within a block, especially the green channel (5 bits, smaller than R's 6).

Slide block-rounding to see the artifact severity.
